records.text: Official WHO dengue surveillance page for Aedes aegypti public-health intelligence. Organization: WHO. Topic: global dengue situation surveillance progress update. Summary: Dengue: global situation, surveillance and progress - 2024 update. Parsed metrics: reported_cases=1.44346e+07, laboratory_confirmed_cases=7.71858e+06, severe_cases=52738, deaths=11201, brazil_cases=1e+07, brazil_deaths=6321. Page excerpt: Dengue: global situation, surveillance and progress - 2024 update. Weekly epidemiological record. 26 December 2025 | Publication. Download (230.5 kB) WHO received reports of 14 434 584 cases, including 7 718 585 laboratory-confirmed, 52 738 severe and 11 201 deaths in all 6 regions.. Brazil alone reported over 10 000 000 cases and 6321 deaths...
records.title: WHO dengue surveillance: Dengue: global situation, surveillance and progress - 2024 update
